sources.sourceExcerpt: Three million weekly Codex users. Usage limits were reset, with a commitment to repeat resets for every additional million users up to 10M.
sources.verificationNotes: Official announcement URL supplied in the canonical project record.
sources.notes: Primary 3M announcement. No historical X crawl was performed.

dataProvenance.notes: Canonical record mapped without LLM modification.

sources.sourceExcerpt: Secondary official source attached to the supplied 3M canonical record.

sources.notes: The related 3M event timestamp is used for grouping only.

dataProvenance.notes: Canonical secondary source preserved without content inference.

sources.sourceExcerpt: Seven million active users. One banked reset was added to each eligible account.
